title: acanthocereus oaxacensis
intro: Acanthocereus oaxacensis, also known as the Oaxacan prickly pear cactus, is a species of cactus native to the Mexican state of Oaxaca, characterized by its distinctive globose stems and sharp spines. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Acanthocereus oaxacensis include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating symptoms of digestive disorders. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and topical applications of its gel or oil extracts.
